projectName: VIABIX SaaS - PHP/MySQL Industrial Engineering Platform

mainConcerns: Incomplete security layer implementations (2FA, email validation)
Multi-tenancy not enforced in all contexts
Performance degradation paths (JSON queries, unbounded lists)

securityIssues.issue: Rate limiting not persistent across requests
securityIssues.description: Rate limiting via $_SESSION is only per-session and resets on new session. Attackers can bypass by creating new sessions/IPs.
securityIssues.cveRelated: CWE-770: Allocation of Resources Without Limits
securityIssues.recommendation: Implement persistent rate limiting using Redis or database table with IP-based keys. Create centralized rate limiter middleware.
securityIssues.exampleFix: Use Redis INCR with expiring keys (TTL), fallback to database with cleanup cron

securityIssues.description: webhook_billing.php lacks request signature validation. Only checks event_id uniqueness, not authenticity. HMAC/signature verification missing.
securityIssues.cveRelated: CWE-347: Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature
securityIssues.recommendation: Implement HMAC-SHA256 signature validation for incoming webhooks. Validate timestamp to prevent replay attacks.
securityIssues.exampleFix: Add viabixValidateWebhookSignature() with hash_hmac('sha256', $payload, $secret) verification before processing

securityIssues.issue: Tenant isolation not enforced consistently across all tables
securityIssues.description: Multi-tenant support added incrementally. Not all queries check tenant_id. Risk of data leakage between tenants.
securityIssues.cveRelated: CWE-639: Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key
securityIssues.recommendation: Enforce tenant_id in all queries via SQL views or middleware. Add unit tests for tenant isolation.
securityIssues.audit: Review: anvi.php lines 40-43, 124-127 - some queries missing tenant_id filters when tenantAwareAnvis=true

securityIssues.issue: Missing input validation on critical endpoints
securityIssues.description: endpoints like anvi.php accept raw JSON without comprehensive validation. Only basic presence checks exist.
securityIssues.recommendation: Use ViabixValidator class for all POST/PUT endpoints. Define strict schemas.

securityIssues.issue: No encryption at rest for sensitive data
securityIssues.description: Passwords are hashed (bcrypt) but emails, phone numbers, and billing data are stored in plaintext.
securityIssues.cveRelated: CWE-312: Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information
securityIssues.recommendation: Implement column-level encryption for PII. Use AES-256-GCM with key rotation.
securityIssues.exampleFix: CREATE TABLE usuarios (...email VARBINARY(255)...) with viabixEncrypt()/viabixDecrypt() functions

securityIssues.description: email.php defines sendEmail() but implementation is stub. No emails are actually sent. Verification, password resets will fail silently.
securityIssues.cveRelated: CWE-573: Improper Following of Specification by Caller
securityIssues.recommendation: Complete email provider implementations (SendGrid, SMTP). Add email queue with retry logic.

securityIssues.description: Security headers (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, CSP) mentioned in memory but not implemented in code. Vulnerable to clickjacking, XSS.
securityIssues.recommendation: Add middleware function viabixApplySecurityHeaders() in config.php bootstrap.
securityIssues.exampleFix: header('X-Frame-Options: DENY'); header('X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff'); header('X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block');

securityIssues.description: CORS allows localhost:* for development. Production config requires manual ENV setup. No validation of CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS format.
securityIssues.recommendation: Add CORS validation helper. Test against wildcard/regex bypasses.

securityIssues.description: two_factor_auth.php has TOTP/backup code implementation but login.php doesn't call it. 2FA is dead code.
securityIssues.recommendation: Integrate 2FA challenge after password validation. Store TOTP secret/backup codes in usuarios table.
securityIssues.missingImplementation: login.php needs: check 2FA enabled -> prompt code -> verify via ViabixTwoFactorAuth

securityIssues.description: Long-running queries (anvi.php with large JSON) can exhaust resources. No request timeout configuration.
securityIssues.cveRelated: CWE-770: Allocation of Resources Without Limits
securityIssues.recommendation: Set max_execution_time and set_time_limit() per endpoint. Add query timeout.

securityIssues.issue: Insufficient logging of failed security events
securityIssues.description: Failed 2FA, CSRF, rate limit events logged to Sentry but not persisted in audit_logs. Compliance violations.
securityIssues.recommendation: Log ALL security events to audit_logs table with user_id, ip, user_agent.

securityIssues.description: No api/reset_password.php or similar. Users cannot recover forgotten passwords securely.
securityIssues.recommendation: Implement forgot_password.php with email verification token (time-limited, single-use).

performanceIssues.issue: No indexes on new multi-tenant columns
performanceIssues.description: Migration adds tenant_id to anvis, usuarios, logs_atividade but no indexes. FULLTEXT index on anvis still exists but no composite indexes.
performanceIssues.impact: O(n) table scans for every WHERE tenant_id = ? query
performanceIssues.recommendation: Add INDEX idx_tenant_id (tenant_id) to all multi-tenant tables. Add composite indexes: (tenant_id, status), (tenant_id, criado_em).
performanceIssues.exampleFix: ALTER TABLE usuarios ADD INDEX idx_tenant_id (tenant_id); ALTER TABLE anvis ADD INDEX idx_tenant_status (tenant_id, status);

performanceIssues.issue: Unbounded result sets in list endpoints
performanceIssues.description: anvi.php GET without ?id returns ALL ANVIs without LIMIT. usuarios.php lists all users. No pagination.
performanceIssues.impact: Memory exhaustion with 10k+ records. Transfer slow. UI hangs.
performanceIssues.recommendation: Implement pagination with LIMIT/OFFSET. Default limit=50, max=200. Add count endpoint.
performanceIssues.exampleFix: GET /api/anvi.php?page=1&limit=50 -> SELECT ... FROM anvis WHERE tenant_id = ? LIMIT 50 OFFSET 0

performanceIssues.description: Lines 169-185 loop through payments and fetch invoice/subscription/tenant for each. Should use JOIN.
performanceIssues.impact: 1 initial query + N subqueries. 100 payments = 101 queries.
performanceIssues.recommendation: Use JOIN or load data in batches. Pre-fetch related records.
performanceIssues.exampleFix: SELECT p.*, i.numero, i.status as invoice_status, s.ciclo, t.nome as tenant_nome FROM payments p JOIN invoices i... JOIN subscriptions s... JOIN tenants t... WHERE p.created_at > ?

performanceIssues.description: anvi.php stores full data in JSON column 'dados'. No JSON indexes. Queries like JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.anviId') = ? are slow.
performanceIssues.impact: O(n) JSON parsing for each row. 1000s of ANVIs = seconds of query time.
performanceIssues.recommendation: Extract frequently-searched JSON fields into normal columns OR use generated/virtual columns with indexes.
performanceIssues.exampleFix: ALTER TABLE anvis ADD COLUMN anvi_numero VARCHAR(50) GENERATED ALWAYS AS (JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.numero'))) STORED INDEX idx_anvi_numero;

performanceIssues.description: Plans, tenants, subscriptions queried repeatedly per request. No caching. viabixFindPlan() queries DB every time.
performanceIssues.impact: 5-10 extra DB queries per request that could be cached.
performanceIssues.recommendation: Implement Redis cache layer for plans, tenants, subscriptions. 5min TTL.

performanceIssues.description: webhook_events INSERT every webhook but no retention policy. Table will grow infinitely.
performanceIssues.impact: After 1 year with 10 webhooks/day: 3650 rows. After 5 years: 18k rows. Historical data becomes slow.
performanceIssues.recommendation: Archive old webhooks. Add PARTITION BY DATE or implement soft deletes with cleanup cron.
performanceIssues.exampleFix: ALTER TABLE webhook_events ADD COLUMN deleted_at DATETIME NULL; DELETE FROM webhook_events WHERE processado = 1 AND created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY);

performanceIssues.description: PDO creates new MySQL connection per request. No persistent connections or connection pooling.
performanceIssues.impact: Connection overhead: ~100ms per request × connection cost.
performanceIssues.recommendation: Use ProxySQL or PgBouncer for connection pooling. Or enable PDO::ATTR_PERSISTENT.
performanceIssues.exampleFix: DSN += ';charset=utf8mb4' or use 'pdo_mysql' with pool config

performanceIssues.issue: Large response bodies for ANVI export
performanceIssues.description: GET /api/anvi.php?id=X returns full JSON data. No compression. Large ANVIs (100kb+) sent uncompressed.
performanceIssues.recommendation: Enable gzip in nginx/Apache. Offer ?format=csv for tabular data.
performanceIssues.exampleFix: header('Content-Encoding: gzip'); or use Output Filter in .htaccess

performanceIssues.issue: Audit logs stored synchronously in critical paths
performanceIssues.description: Every login, CRUD op, API call inserts into logs_atividade synchronously. Blocks response.
performanceIssues.recommendation: Queue audit logs async (use Redis queue + cron job or message bus).

architectureProblems.description: config.php includes database connection, utility functions, auth helpers, billing logic, schema introspection, error handling. Violates Single Responsibility Principle.
architectureProblems.complexity: Lines of code: 1200+, Functions defined: 50+, Classes included: 0
architectureProblems.recommendation: Break into separate modules: Database.php, Auth.php, Billing.php, Schema.php, Errors.php
refactoringPlan: Keep config.php as bootstrap loader only

architectureProblems.description: No centralized way to apply auth, CSRF, CORS, rate limit, validation. Each endpoint duplicates checks.
architectureProblems.recommendation: Create Middleware class with pipeline pattern. Order: CORS -> CSRF -> RateLimit -> Auth -> Validation.

architectureProblems.description: All endpoints write SQL directly. No abstraction layer. Queries scattered across 50 files.
architectureProblems.recommendation: Create Repository classes: AnviRepository, UserRepository, SubscriptionRepository with methods like findById(), findByTenant(), update(), delete().
architectureProblems.exampleFix: class AnviRepository { public function findById($id, $tenantId) { return $this->pdo->prepare('SELECT * FROM anvis WHERE id = ? AND tenant_id = ?')->execute([$id, $tenantId])->fetch(); } }

architectureProblems.issue: High coupling between auth, permission, and audit systems
architectureProblems.description: auth_system.php, permissions.php, audit.php have interdependencies. Changes break multiple modules.
architectureProblems.recommendation: Define clear interfaces. Use event-driven pattern: UserLoggedIn -> audit listener -> record log.
architectureProblems.exampleFix: interface EventListener { onUserLoggedIn($user) {} } class AuditListener implements EventListener { ... }

architectureProblems.description: Some tables have tenant_id, others don't. Some queries check it, others bypass. No enforced pattern.
architectureProblems.recommendation: Enforce multi-tenancy via: (1) Database views that add WHERE tenant_id filter, (2) Tenant middleware that throws 403 for mismatches.
architectureProblems.exampleFix: CREATE VIEW usuarios_tenant AS SELECT * FROM usuarios WHERE tenant_id = CURRENT_SETTING('app.tenant_id');

architectureProblems.description: 50+ viabix*() functions are global. Namespace pollution. Hard to test. No dependency injection.
architectureProblems.recommendation: Create ServiceContainer class. Register services. Inject via constructor.

architectureProblems.description: Generic RuntimeException thrown. No custom exceptions for validation, auth, permission, billing errors. Poor error handling.
architectureProblems.recommendation: Create exception hierarchy: ViabixException -> AuthException, ValidationException, BillingException, etc.
architectureProblems.exampleFix: throw new AuthException('CSRF token invalid', 403); throw new SubscriptionException('Plan not found', 404);

bestPracticesViolations.issue: No type hints in function signatures
bestPracticesViolations.description: PHP 8.2 supports strict types but codebase uses none. Functions accept any type.
examples: function viabixRequireAuthentication($requireAdmin = false) -> function viabixRequireAuthentication(bool $requireAdmin = false): array
bestPracticesViolations.recommendation: Add strict_types=1 and type hints to all functions. Use union types where applicable.

bestPracticesViolations.description: Only manual test scripts exist (test_*.php). No PHPUnit, no CI/CD test runner.
bestPracticesViolations.recommendation: Set up PHPUnit. Write tests for: Auth, CSRF, Rate limit, Validation, Billing webhook. Target 60%+ coverage.

bestPracticesViolations.impact: Typos cause silent bugs. Refactoring prone to errors.
bestPracticesViolations.recommendation: Create UserRole, PlanStatus, PaymentStatus enums (PHP 8.1+) or constants.
bestPracticesViolations.exampleFix: enum UserRole { case ADMIN; case EDITOR; case VIEWER; }

bestPracticesViolations.description: Mix of camelCase (viabixRequireAuth), snake_case (viabix_env), and inconsistent prefixes (VIABIX_ vs viabix_).
Some functions have docblocks, others don't. Parameters not documented. Return types unclear.
bestPracticesViolations.recommendation: Add PHPDoc to all public functions with @param, @return, @throws.

bestPracticesViolations.description: No CHANGELOG.md, no version tags, no deprecation warnings. API breaking changes not tracked.
bestPracticesViolations.recommendation: Create CHANGELOG.md. Use semantic versioning. Mark breaking changes.

bestPracticesViolations.description: All endpoints at /api/*.php. No /api/v1/, /api/v2/ structure. Breaking changes will break clients.
bestPracticesViolations.recommendation: Plan for /api/v1/ namespace. Document deprecation policy.

bestPracticesViolations.description: Some complex logic (JSON merging in anvi.php, billing event handling) lacks explanation.

missingFeatures.description: email.php is a stub. No emails sent. Signup verification, password reset, 2FA codes not delivered.
missingFeatures.recommendation: Implement SMTP/SendGrid/Mailgun provider fully. Add email queue.

missingFeatures.description: two_factor_auth.php has TOTP logic but login.php doesn't call it. 2FA can't be enforced.
missingFeatures.recommendation: Integrate 2FA prompt after password validation. Store TOTP secret in usuarios table.

missingFeatures.description: No forgot_password.php endpoint. Users can't recover locked accounts.
missingFeatures.recommendation: Create reset token flow with email verification.

missingFeatures.description: No endpoint for users to download their data (required by GDPR Article 20).
missingFeatures.recommendation: Create /api/export_user_data.php that returns JSON/CSV of all user-owned data.

missingFeatures.description: Webhooks stored if processing fails but never retried. Failed payments won't be reconciled.
missingFeatures.recommendation: Add retry queue. Implement exponential backoff (1min, 5min, 30min, 2h, 24h).

missingFeatures.description: Dashboard disables UI but API doesn't validate. Can directly call /api/projetos if role is 'usuario'.
missingFeatures.recommendation: Add viabixCheckFeatureAccess() middleware to all feature-gated endpoints.

missingFeatures.description: DELETE queries are hard deletes. Can't recover data. GDPR right-to-be-forgotten complicates with references.
missingFeatures.recommendation: Add deleted_at column. Create archives. Implement cascade soft delete.

missingFeatures.description: No way to notify users of events (payment due, plan upgrade, admin messages).
missingFeatures.recommendation: Create notification table + queue. Support email, SMS (Twilio), in-app.

missingFeatures.description: Only session-based auth. No API tokens for integrations, third-party apps, mobile clients.
missingFeatures.recommendation: Implement OAuth2 / Bearer tokens. Create token management UI.

missingFeatures.description: No analytics on user activity, feature usage, billing trends. audit_logs exist but not exposed.
missingFeatures.recommendation: Create analytics endpoint querying audit_logs. Add charts in admin panel.

refactoringOpportunities.title: Extract Database Access Layer
refactoringOpportunities.description: Create repositories to abstract database access. Reduces coupling, improves testability.
steps: 3. Migrate queries from endpoints to repositories

refactoringOpportunities.title: Create Middleware Pipeline
refactoringOpportunities.description: Centralize middleware (auth, CSRF, rate limit, validation) to DRY up endpoint code.
steps: 4. Update all endpoints to use pipeline

refactoringOpportunities.title: Split config.php into modules
refactoringOpportunities.description: Break 1200+ line config.php into focused modules.

refactoringOpportunities.title: Introduce Service Container
refactoringOpportunities.description: Replace global functions with injected services. Improve testability.
steps: 2. Register services: AuthService, PermissionService, BillingService, etc.

refactoringOpportunities.title: Add Type Hints Everywhere
refactoringOpportunities.description: Add strict type hints to all functions (250+ functions).
steps: 2. Add parameter types to all functions
3. Add return types to all functions
benefits: Catch type errors at compile time

refactoringOpportunities.title: Replace Magic Strings with Enums/Constants
refactoringOpportunities.description: Create enums for user roles, plan statuses, payment statuses, etc.
enums: enum UserRole { ADMIN, EDITOR, VIEWER, GUEST }
enum PaymentStatus { PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED, REFUNDED }
enum InvoiceStatus { DRAFT, SENT, PENDING, PAID, OVERDUE, CANCELLED }
enum TenantStatus { ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, CANCELLED, INADIMPLENTE }

refactoringOpportunities.title: Implement Repository Pattern for Queries
refactoringOpportunities.description: Move all SQL from endpoints to repository classes. Single query location.

refactoringOpportunities.title: Create proper HTTP Request/Response classes
refactoringOpportunities.description: Replace raw $_GET/$_POST/$_SERVER with Request class. Typed responses.

refactoringOpportunities.title: Extract validation schemas
refactoringOpportunities.description: Define validation rules in reusable schema classes instead of inline.

immediateActions.action: Implement persistent rate limiting (Redis or database)
immediateActions.reason: Protect against brute force and API abuse
Prevent webhook spoofing and payment fraud

immediateActions.action: Enforce tenant_id in all queries (audit remaining)

immediateActions.reason: Unblock user onboarding and password recovery

immediateActions.action: Add database indexes on tenant_id columns
immediateActions.reason: Improve query performance for multi-tenant setup

items: Add type hints to all functions
[ ] Tenant isolation enforced in all queries
[ ] Session secure cookies enabled (SECURE, HTTPONLY, SAMESITE)
[ ] Database indexes on common queries (tenant_id, created_at)
